name: model-family-mae
description: Orchestrated model-family exploration workflow for tabular MAE challenges, with separate planning, isolated execution, reflection, and promotion gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, run, reflect, and promote isolated MAE experiments.
interface.longDescription: A structured workflow for long-running tabular MAE exploration. It separates orchestration, stage planning, isolated worker runs, reflection gates, and final promotion so agents can collaborate without mixing state or overwriting experiments.
defaultPrompt: Reflect on this MAE run result.
